title: AI Filmmaking Workflow: How To Create AI Videos With Full Automation
summary: A video demonstrates building a cinematic short film using Topview Drama Studio, starting from a two-sentence pitch and covering story building, character design, dialogue, lighting, and rendering. The tool enables solo filmmaking with consistent characters and professional output without crew.
